rationale: The citing paper references Yao et al. (2012) only once, in an introductory sentence noting that dynamic structural models in marketing often make common discount-rate assumptions. The citation serves as a background pointer ("for a discussion") rather than as a source of a borrowed method, measure, model component, or empirical benchmark used in the analyses. The paper's hypotheses, estimation strategy, and results are developed without direct dependence on this specific cited work.
